items.content: Validate refactor-planning.md: Check for gaps, dependencies, and priority alignment
items.evidence: Validated refactor-planning.md against current source. Found: (1) turn_count issue CONFIRMED, (2) drift_score formula CONFIRMED, (3) keyword_flags cascade CONFIRMED, (4) GovernanceCounters already simplified (Fix 1.5B applied), (5) ignored counter issue partially mitigated but reset logic still no-op. Plan needs adjustment for current codebase state.

Phase 3 Implementation: Fix keyword_flags + evidence_pressure cascade
Phase 4 Implementation: Fix ignored counter runaway with caps and proper reset logic

Track 1: Data Pipeline & Lifecycle Mapping - Investigate all data flows from ingress to egress, session phases, state mutations, memory evolution
items.evidence: Track 1 complete: 7 ingress points, 7 lifecycle phases, 7 mutation pathways, 7 persistence layers, 6 egress points. 95% confidence.

items.content: Track 2: Hooks & Injection Systems Inventory - Enumerate all mechanisms that can alter flow/context (System 1: hiveops-governance, System 2: src/hooks/, plugins, middleware)
items.evidence: Track 2 complete: 11 hooks inventoried, 6 conflicts identified. Critical: dual-injection race conditions. 95% confidence.

items.content: Track 3: Schema & Contract Stability Analysis - Identify schema conflicts, transformations, validation boundaries, version drift across layers
items.evidence: Track 3 complete: 14 schemas, 5 drift points, 5 contract conflicts. Critical: governance_counters incomplete migration. 92% confidence.

items.content: Track 4: Context Pollution Diagnosis - Map dual-injection conflicts, context assembly pathways, pruning/compaction logic correctness
items.evidence: Track 4 complete: 6 pollution pathways, 5 dual-injection conflicts mapped. Primary contamination source: dual_state_read_conflict. 95% confidence.

items.content: Track 5: Domain Boundaries & Packaging Audit - Analyze SDK vs server vs primitives boundaries, .opencode/plugins vs src/ duplication, orchestrator lineages
items.evidence: Track 5 complete: 7 domains, 4 duplications, 5 confusion points. Critical: dual context injection systems. 95% confidence.

items.content: SYNTHESIS: Consolidate 5 tracks into deliverables - System Map, Risk Register, Refactor Blueprint
items.evidence: Deliverables A/B/C synthesized into DEEP-SCAN-AUDIT-2026-03-05.md. 95% confidence. Primary contamination source: dual-injection systems.
